description: AI-powered pre-mortem release analysis tool that identifies failure risks before shipping

routes.description: Landing/home page with hero section and CTA links

requirements.title: Landing Page
requirements.description: The landing page must render hero section with product description, step-by-step pipeline, and CTA links to Dashboard and Create Release pages

requirements.title: Dashboard - Release List
requirements.description: Dashboard must show all releases with title, status badge, verdict badge, risk score, checklist progress, and creation date. Must show empty state when no releases exist.

requirements.title: Create Release Form
requirements.description: Form must require title and release notes. Version and owner are optional. On submit, creates a release in DRAFT status with NEEDS_ATTENTION verdict and risk score 0, then redirects to release detail page.

requirements.title: Release Detail - Header
requirements.description: Release detail must show title, version badge (if present), owner (if present), creation date, status badge, verdict badge, and risk score.

requirements.title: Release Detail - Analysis
requirements.description: Run Analysis button must trigger AI pre-mortem analysis, show loading state, then display identified risks and mitigation checklist items. Re-run clears old data.

requirements.title: Risk Management
requirements.description: Risks must show severity badges (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW). Users can toggle risks as resolved. Risk score and verdict update after each toggle.

requirements.title: Mitigation Checklist
requirements.description: Checklist items can be toggled complete/incomplete. Progress count and verdict update accordingly.

requirements.title: Approvals
requirements.description: Three roles required: ENGINEERING, QA, PRODUCT. Users can submit APPROVED or REJECTED with optional comment. All three must be APPROVED for READY verdict.

requirements.title: Timeline
requirements.description: Chronological log of all release events including CREATED, ANALYZED, RISK_RESOLVED, CHECKLIST_COMPLETED, APPROVAL_UPDATED, STATUS_CHANGED, VERDICT_CHANGED.

requirements.title: Form Validation
requirements.description: Create release form must show field-level errors for missing required fields and display error banner on API failure.

create_release: User is redirected to release detail page after creation
run_analysis: Clears previous risks and checklist items
Generates new risks and checklist items
Recomputes status, verdict, and risk score
dashboard: Lists all releases ordered by creation date
Shows empty state when no releases exist
Each release links to detail page
